title: 10 best herbal creams for glowing skin
description: Calendula officinalis, also known as pot marigold, creams helps with glowing skin because of its rich antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The cream's high concentration of triterpenoid saponins and carotenoids helps to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation. As a result, the skin's natural barrier is restored, allowing it to better retain moisture and appear smoother and more radiant. Regular use can lead to a more even-toned complexion and an overa...
